name: Image Editor — Crop Handles, Rotate Wheel, Text/Overlay Drag

features.label: Crop with Draggable Border Handles
features.desc: Crop selection shows 8 resize handles (corners + edges) with rule-of-thirds grid. Drag handles to resize, drag inside to move. Inputs sync live.

features.label: Rotate Wheel UI
features.desc: Quarter-circle arc with tick marks on canvas. Drag to set angle. Right panel shows degree input + axis selector.

features.label: Text & Overlay Drag-Drop
features.desc: Text items show dashed selection box and can be dragged on canvas. Image overlays have move + resize handle (bottom-right corner).
